title: prokeimai #4295
definition:
1) to lie or be placed before (a person or a thing) or in front of
 2) to set before
    2a) to be placed before the eyes, to lie in sight
        2a1) to stand forth
    2b) to be appointed, destined
    2c) to be there, be present, be at hand
nasbUsage:
